reviews.comment:
Pase tipo 22.30 horas un viernes y sólo había 2 personas que atendían 4 bocas de expendio. Desastroso. Encima somos socios del ACA. Un desastre y encima 2 enormes carros de Asalto de la Policía de la Ciudad que ocuparon una de las 4 bocas y a 1 de las 2 personas que atendían. Me parece que el Gobierno de la Ciudas tiene otros lugares especificos para cargar y no obstruir las bocas de expendio que son pocas y ya están mal atendidas. Esto fue el viernes pasado 28/9/19 Creo que el ACA tendría que poner más personal, puesto que estas 2 personas tienen largos horarios, necesidades fisiológicas y derecho a tomar algo en tantas horas y los clientes derecho a ser atendidos sin tantas demoras.

(Translated by Google)
I went by around 10:30 PM on a Friday and there were only two people serving four fuel pumps. Disastrous. And on top of that, we're members of the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina). It was a disaster, and to make matters worse, two huge armored vehicles from the City Police were blocking one of the four pumps and one of the two people working there. I think the City Government has other designated refueling areas so they don't obstruct the few fuel pumps that are already poorly staffed. This was last Friday, September 28, 2019. I think the ACA should hire more staff, since these two people work long hours, have rest needs, and the right to get something to eat or drink during those hours, and customers have the right to be served without such long delays.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMwN2ZUVHBnRRAB
